docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY MATULA, MYRTA MATULA, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, L.P. STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATULA, MYRTA MATULA, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JON JORGENSEN--OPERATIONS MANAGER AND JAMES ADAMS SR.--SECURITY DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATULA, MYRTA MATULA, GEORGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, L.P. STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
